title: 11 Reconciliation of Electronic Bill Payments
body_text:
11	Reconciliation of Electronic Bill Payments
11.1	Balancing and Reconciling Bill Payments
Financial institutions are responsible for ensuring that the bill payments posted to customers芒聙聶 accounts reconcile with the settlement totals processed by Central聽1.
See Chapter 9, Electronic Bill Payment Reports, for more information on the reports described in this section.
The financial institution proceeds as follows to balance bill payment transactions daily:
Confirm that the transaction total on the BPRS report is the same as the settlement amount provided by Central 1. If the amounts don芒聙聶t balance, check the BPRT report for the same date as the original transaction. Items that Central 1 rejected aren芒聙聶t included in the Central 1 settlement amount. The amount of the BPRS plus the amount of the BPRT should equal the amount settled to the financial institution芒聙聶s Central 1 account.
Note: 	Payments to Vancity VISA, Vancity Com. Inv. Bank Visa, and Community VISA will be sent to the biller on the following business day if they are received at Central 1 after 3:00 pm PT. These payments won芒聙聶t be included on the current day芒聙聶s reports. They will be reported with transactions that are submitted on the following business day. Specifically, these transactions won芒聙聶t be included on the BPRS on the day they are sent to Central 1 but will be included on the following business day. Financial Institutions in Ontario can refer to Section 9.10, BPTP 芒聙聯 Bill Payments 15:00 (Pacific) Billers.
Confirm that the totals listed on the banking system reports correspond to the Central 1 settlement amount. If the amounts don芒聙聶t balance, determine if the transaction was rejected as described above. If the transaction appears on the BPRE or BPTR report but not on the banking system reports, it wasn芒聙聶t processed by the banking system. Debit the customer manually.
11.2	Using the HREC File for Reconciliation
The HREC file is used for reconciliation purposes and is available to subscribing financial institutions and centrals. The file lists the bill payment transactions received from different channels that have been processed through Central 1芒聙聶s Bill Payment System (transactions are also listed in the BPRE report). It doesn芒聙聶t contain rejected transactions listed in the BPRT report. The file is generated daily and can be used to calculate totals for settlement or for bill payment reconciliation processes against the records on the bank host system.
To obtain the HREC File, go to Central 1芒聙聶s File and Report Exchange and download the file from the root directory. See the File Exchange and Report Distribution Part for procedures on accessing the File and Report Exchange. The file is in CSV format and is generally available by 7:00 am PT.
Related Information
HREC File Specifications,
Form 6118
END
